title: Unity Bank Facilitates Financial Literacy Training At St Columba’s Grammar School, Agbor
description: As part of activities to mark the 2022 Global Money Week, Nigerian lender, Unity Bank Plc facilitated Financial Literacy Training at St Columba’s Grammar School, Agbor, Delta State, as well as i
html: As part of activities to mark the 2022 Global Money Week, Nigerian lender, Unity Bank Plc facilitated Financial Literacy Training at St Columba’s Grammar School, Agbor, Delta State, as well as in 30 other schools across the federation.
